description:
INSTRUCTIONS: READ CAREFULLY: How many stones of a completed living group need to be on the second line or higher?
Stones at the edge don't count; use as many as you like.
Choose one of the indicated numbers (0 to 5). Next, the problem will provide an example of a group with the chosen number of 'high' stones (if possible).
sgf:
(;LB[ee:0]LB[ge:1]LB[ie:2]LB[ke:3]LB[me:4]LB[oe:5]C[How many stones that are not on the very edge (like on the 1st line) do you need to make a living group, no matter what borders it? Please click on a number. FORCE]LB[jb:Please read the instructions before you choose]LB[jr:Remember this is in the Strange and Fun groups]AP[goproblems]

By only using the first line Black lives in the biggest way possible (sizewise)... Never seen this happen in a game though.RIGHT]MA[aa]MA[sa]MA[ss]MA[as])
